## Describe the PR
*Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does.*

## Conformance Verification
*If you are modifying the core parser logic, you MUST verify the changes against the cross-language conformance suite.*
- [ ] Python tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Node.js tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No regression in token extraction efficiency

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Protocol Change / Breaking Change (Requires RFC)
- [ ] Documentation update
